mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_order_count,
COUNT( CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 END ) AS completed_order_count,
COUNT( CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'CANCELED' THEN 1 END ) AS canceled_order_count,
COALESCE( SUM( CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN COALESCE(o.total_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 0 ) AS total_sales,
COALESCE( SUM( CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN COALESCE(o.net_profit, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 0 ) AS total_net_profit,
COUNT( CASE WHEN order_request.risk_level IN ( 'CAUTION', 'WARNING', 'DANGER' ) OR order_request.risk_type IN ( 'ALLERGY', 'DISPUTE', 'EXCESSIVE' ) THEN 1 END ) AS request_risk_count,
COUNT( CASE WHEN COALESCE(o.net_profit, 0) <= 0 AND o.order_status NOT IN ( 'CANCELED', 'REFUNDED' ) THEN 1 END ) AS loss_risk_count
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN order_requests order_request ON order_request.order_id = o.id
LEFT JOIN order_cancellations order_cancellation ON order_cancellation.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( ( o.ordered_at >= #{search.businessStartAt} AND o.ordered_at < #{search.businessEndAt} ) OR ( o.order_status = 'COMPLETED' AND o.completed_at IS NOT NULL AND o.completed_at >= #{search.businessStartAt} AND o.completed_at < #{search.businessEndAt} ) OR ( o.order_status = 'CANCELED' AND o.canceled_at IS NOT NULL AND o.canceled_at >= #{search.businessStartAt} AND o.canceled_at < #{search.businessEndAt} ) OR ( o.order_status = 'REFUNDED' AND o.refunded_at IS NOT NULL AND o.refunded_at >= #{search.businessStartAt} AND o.refunded_at < #{search.businessEndAt} ) )
AND o.platform_type = #{search.platformType}
AND o.order_status = #{search.orderStatus}
AND order_request.risk_type = #{search.riskType}
AND( o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR o.platform_order_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR o.delivery_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR order_request.request_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR order_cancellation.cancel_reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') )

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.platform_order_number, o.platform_type, o.order_status, o.total_amount, o.commission_amount, o.delivery_fee, o.coupon_cost, o.platform_support_amount, o.total_menu_cost, o.total_packaging_fee, o.net_profit, o.delivery_address, o.ordered_at, o.cooking_started_at, o.completed_at, o.canceled_at, o.refunded_at,
order_request.request_text AS request_text, order_request.risk_type AS request_risk_type, order_request.risk_level AS request_risk_level, order_request.analysis_message AS request_analysis_message,
order_cancellation.cancel_type AS cancel_type, order_cancellation.cancel_reason AS cancel_reason, order_refund.refund_type AS refund_type, order_refund.refund_reason AS refund_reason,
COALESCE(item_summary.total_quantity, 0) AS total_quantity,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(item_summary.item_count, 0) = 0 THEN '-'
WHEN item_summary.item_count = 1 THEN first_item.ordered_menu_name
ELSE CONCAT( first_item.ordered_menu_name, ' 외 ', item_summary.item_count - 1, '개' ) END AS menu_summary
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity, COUNT(*) AS item_count, MIN(id) AS first_item_id FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id ) item_summary ON item_summary.order_id = o.id
LEFT JOIN order_items first_item ON first_item.id = item_summary.first_item_id
LEFT JOIN order_requests order_request ON order_request.order_id = o.id
LEFT JOIN order_cancellations order_cancellation ON order_cancellation.order_id = o.id
LEFT JOIN order_refunds order_refund ON order_refund.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( ( o.ordered_at >= #{search.businessStartAt} AND o.ordered_at < #{search.businessEndAt} ) OR ( o.order_status = 'COMPLETED' AND o.completed_at IS NOT NULL AND o.completed_at >= #{search.businessStartAt} AND o.completed_at < #{search.businessEndAt} ) OR ( o.order_status = 'CANCELED' AND o.canceled_at IS NOT NULL AND o.canceled_at >= #{search.businessStartAt} AND o.canceled_at < #{search.businessEndAt} ) OR ( o.order_status = 'REFUNDED' AND o.refunded_at IS NOT NULL AND o.refunded_at >= #{search.businessStartAt} AND o.refunded_at < #{search.businessEndAt} ) )
AND o.platform_type = #{search.platformType}
AND o.order_status = #{search.orderStatus}
AND order_request.risk_type = #{search.riskType}
AND( o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR o.platform_order_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR o.delivery_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR order_request.request_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR order_cancellation.cancel_reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY o.ordered_at DESC, o.id DESC

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.platform_order_number, o.platform_type, o.total_amount, o.net_profit, o.ordered_at, o.canceled_at,
order_cancellation.previous_status AS previous_status, order_cancellation.cancel_type AS cancel_type, order_refund.refund_type AS refund_type, order_refund.refund_reason AS refund_reason, order_cancellation.cancel_reason AS cancel_reason, order_cancellation.canceled_by_type AS canceled_by_type, order_cancellation.canceled_by_user_id AS canceled_by_user_id,
order_request.request_text AS request_text, order_request.risk_type AS request_risk_type, order_request.risk_level AS request_risk_level,
COALESCE(item_summary.total_quantity, 0) AS total_quantity,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(item_summary.item_count, 0) = 0 THEN '-'
WHEN item_summary.item_count = 1 THEN first_item.ordered_menu_name
ELSE CONCAT( first_item.ordered_menu_name, ' 외 ', item_summary.item_count - 1, '개' ) END AS menu_summary
FROM orders o
INNER JOIN order_cancellations order_cancellation ON order_cancellation.order_id = o.id
LEFT JOIN order_requests order_request ON order_request.order_id = o.id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity, COUNT(*) AS item_count, MIN(id) AS first_item_id FROM order_items GROUP BY order_id ) item_summary ON item_summary.order_id = o.id
LEFT JOIN order_items first_item ON first_item.id = item_summary.first_item_id
LEFT JOIN order_refunds order_refund ON order_refund.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.deleted_at IS NULL AND o.order_status = 'CANCELED'
AND o.canceled_at >= #{search.businessStartAt}
AND o.canceled_at < #{search.businessEndAt}
AND o.platform_type = #{search.platformType}
AND order_request.risk_type = #{search.riskType}
AND( o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR o.platform_order_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR order_request.request_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR order_cancellation.cancel_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR order_cancellation.cancel_reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR order_refund.refund_reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
)
ORDER BY o.canceled_at DESC, o.id DESC
